# bof â€” LLM Quick Index

> A skill library that gives VS Code Copilot Chat and Crush structured developer workflows.
> Pure markdown (skills + agents) with one exception: `bof-mcp/` is a Go MCP server.

---

## Skills (VS Code auto-triggers from `~/.copilot/skills/`)

| Skill | Trigger phrases |
|-------|----------------|
| `brainstorming` | "I want to add", "help me design", "plan a feature", "brainstorm", "let's build" |
| `writing-plans` | "write an implementation plan", "plan this feature", "create tasks for", "break this down" |
| `executing-plans` | "execute the plan", "work through these tasks", "implement tasks one by one" |
| `subagent-driven-development` | "execute the plan", "start implementation with subagents", "implement these tasks" |
| `adversarial-review` | "adversarial review", "review this plan adversarially", "run adversarial review" |
| `test-driven-development` | "implement this function", "write this feature", "fix this bug", "add this method" |
| `verification-before-completion` | "done", "complete", "fixed", "tests pass", "ready to commit" |
| `systematic-debugging` | "test is failing", "this bug", "unexpected behavior", "why is this broken" |
| `requesting-code-review` | "request code review", "review my changes", "review this implementation" |
| `receiving-code-review` | "I received code review feedback", "reviewer says I should" |
| `using-git-worktrees` | "create a worktree", "set up isolated workspace", "start work on new feature branch" |
| `finishing-a-development-branch` | "implementation is complete", "merge this branch", "create a PR" |
| `dispatching-parallel-agents` | "investigate these failures in parallel", "dispatch parallel agents" |
| `mcp-cli` | "query mcp server", "use mcp on demand", "discover mcp tools" |
| `using-tmux-for-interactive-commands` | "run interactive CLI tool", "vim in terminal", "git rebase -i" |
| `writing-skills` | "create a skill", "write a SKILL.md", "test this skill", "improve this skill" |

---

## Agents (`~/.copilot/agents/`)

| Agent | Role |
|-------|------|
| `ImplementerAgent` | Full read/write/execute â€” TDD implementer |
| `SpecReviewerAgent` | Read-only â€” spec compliance review |
| `CodeQualityReviewerAgent` | Read-only â€” code quality review |
| `Adversarial-r0` | Read-only â€” GPT-4.1, hostile plan reviewer, slot 0 |
| `Adversarial-r1` | Read-only â€” Claude Opus 4, hostile plan reviewer, slot 1 |
| `Adversarial-r2` | Read-only â€” GPT-4o, hostile plan reviewer, slot 2 |

---

## bof-mcp Tools (MCP server for Crush / VS Code via MCP)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `discover_models` | List available Crush models with availability status |
| `implementer_agent` | Dispatch ImplementerAgent via Crush |
| `spec_review` | Dispatch SpecReviewerAgent via Crush |
| `quality_review` | Dispatch CodeQualityReviewerAgent via Crush |
| `adversarial_review` | Run adversarial review round via 3-slot model pool |
| `gate_review` | Check `.adversarial/` verdict status |

`adversarial_review` and `gate_review` are disabled with `--no-adversarial`.

---

## Install

```sh
# VS Code Copilot Chat (from WSL)
bash scripts/install.sh

# bof-mcp binary
cd bof-mcp && go build -o bof-mcp .
```

---

## Key Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `AGENTS.md` | Project constitution â€” invariants, conventions, scope |
| `ONBOARDING.md` | Mental model, workflow data flow, key files map |
| `GLOSSARY.md` | Canonical vocabulary |
| `instructions/bof-bootstrap.instructions.md` | Always-on session context injection |
| `docs/specs/tool-mapping.md` | Claude Code â†’ VS Code tool name mapping |
| `docs/planning/ROADMAP.md` | Phase plan and task status |
| `bof-mcp/README.md` | bof-mcp build, config, tool reference |
